title.en: In the Daoshan Realm, the chaotic areas were oc...

content.en:
In the Daoshan Realm, the chaotic areas were occupied by the forces of the Upper Three Heavens, and branches were set up and handed over to the management of subsidiary forces.

After all, the Dao Mountain Realm was too big, and the Dao Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force could not manage it, even if a Chaos Continent sent a True Ancestor to manage it, all the True Ancestors would not be able to manage all the Chaos Continents.

In addition, there are a large number of Dao realms, large universes, ordinary universes, and various special worlds, treasure lands, forbidden lands, and so on in the Daoshan Realm.

Therefore, at this time, the subsidiary forces play a role, manage them for them, and hand over a part of the geniuses and resources regularly.

In the face of the strength of the Upper Triple Heaven forces, many big forces in the Daoshan Realm did not dare to resist at all, if the forces they took refuge in were tough enough, they could still keep part of their territory, and if the forces behind them were not tough, they could only give up their own territory.

However, because the Daoshan Realm is too large, it may take a long time to completely divide the territory.

Moreover, the forces of the Upper Three Heavens also competed with each other, and many times they needed to fight to be able to occupy a Chaos Territory.

Of course, for the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is the most precious world, and the territory here is incomparably precious, it is simply an inch of gold, and any planet is more valuable than the Chaos Continent in the chaos.

Black Wind Mountain has also come to the fore this time, and has also occupied territory after territory, which is managed by peak lords and generals, and their legions are stationed there in peacetime, and there is no need to worry about the top management of Black Wind Mountain.

It is worth mentioning that the Terrans led the Terrans to withdraw from the Void Heaven Kingdom.

For the Terrans, the Void Heaven True Kingdom is still a little too small at the moment.

Ye Tian chose a territory that was not too far away from the Void Heaven True Country, and chose a territory that was dozens of times larger than the Void Heaven True Country, and directly announced that he would occupy this place, and with his back to the Black Wind Mountain, no one dared to provoke him.

Besides, the place he occupied was not big for the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm at all, it was just a projectile land, so he didn't care.

The human race has a large number of true ancestors, so the migration work does not need Ye Tian to worry about.

At this time.

Ye Tian and his family announced a retreat.

Ye Tian wants to impact the Dao Ancestor realm, and his family members also need to improve their strength and strive to step into the ranks of Supreme True Ancestors.

this day.

After Xiao Yue refined a large amount of Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, the Origin was improved, and her physical body was tempered by the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, and it was this improvement that allowed her to completely break the shackles, directly give birth to the Supreme Dao Source, and step into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor.

Xiao Yue broke through, and Ye Tian knew it for the first time.

He was not surprised at all, after all, Xiao Yue had no bottleneck, as long as he improved his strength a little, he could break the shackles and be promoted to the Supreme True Ancestor, if he couldn't break through, it would be strange!

Ye Yu, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue may need a lot of time to break through to the Supreme True Ancestor, and the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi can only help them strengthen their origin and improve their foundation a little, but there is no way to help them step into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor in a short period of time.

"Let's start breaking through!"

Ye Tian reined in his mind, no longer paid attention to the affairs of the outside world, and wholeheartedly broke through the realm of Dao Ancestor.

True Ancestor's stepping into the Dao Ancestor is to join the Dao, and he has long been in unity with his spirit and spirit, so it is not difficult for him to join the Dao, and it can even be said to be very easy.

Therefore, he must cultivate the secret art of merging the path!

The so-called secret technique of merging the path is to fuse the power of the soul, the body, and the true ancestor into one point, mix the elements as one, and then merge with one's own avenue to completely reshape the body.

At that time, it will be the avenue itself!

And Ye Tian needs to be one with the Endless Forbidden Dao, his every move is the embodiment of the Endless Forbidden Dao, and he is the embodiment of the Endless Forbidden Dao!

Of course, the secret art of the Path must be perfect, and it must not contain errors or flaws, otherwise the foundation will be unstable.

The reason why the Dao Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm such as the Forbidden Hall have an unstable foundation and have defective origins is because the Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor passed down the Dao Secret Technique is an incomplete or flawed Dao Secret Technique, although it can also make the True Ancestor Merge Dao become a Dao Ancestor, but the flaw is too great.

It wasn't until a long time later that many Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm perfected the Secret Technique of Merging Dao step by step, and although it was not perfect, there were no major flaws.

And the secret technique of merging the path that Ye Tian cultivated at this time came from the Black Wind Mountain, it was the most perfect secret technique of merging, there was no problem, and it could be guided by the power of the dark taboo, and it could even allow the true ancestor who could not master the power of the dark forbidden to have a trace of forbidden attribute after the merger.

This is the perfect way to do it!

Rumble!

The Secret Technique of Merging Ways Operates –

Ye Tian's body, soul, and true ancestor power seemed to have been absorbed by a certain point in his body, and his body turned into a black spot in a short period of time, and at the same time, the three powers of essence, qi and spirit began to try to fuse.

Other people would be trapped in this step, and they needed to use foreign objects to complete it, but Ye Tian had already done it completely.

As Ye Tian continued to operate the Convergence Secret Technique, the Forbidden Dao Stone and a small piece of the Forbidden Mother Stone that had been arranged around the retreat secret room were attracted by the Convergence Secret Technique, and turned into an incomparably pure dark forbidden power and poured into that black spot.

With the purest dark forbidden power to merge with the Dao to build a foundation, once Ye Tian successfully merges the Dao, not only will the power of the Dao Ancestor become a very pure forbidden Dao power, but even the soul and body will become extremely powerful, and the foundation will be extremely deep.

For others, it is very dangerous to use the power of the Dark Forbidden to build a foundation, but for Ye Tian, who has mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, this way of building a foundation is very safe.

After a long time, that point of unity began to expand, turning into a human form, and began to reshape the body of the Dao Ancestor, also known as the Great Dao Body!

Blood, bones, internal organs, skin, hair......

The composition of each body is condensed, making Ye Tian's whole person perfect, as if it is a thing created by heaven and earth, and it is the most perfect body.

At the same time, Ye Tian's aura became more and more powerful, and countless forbidden origin powers emerged, refining Ye Tian's Great Dao body.

Soon, a large number of forbidden Dao powers were born in Ye Tian's body, and his soul became extremely strong, containing powerful forbidden attributes, and the forbidden body also broke the shackles in an instant, refined to the Dacheng realm, and was still improving rapidly.

Seventy out of one!

Twenty out of seven!

Three out of seven!

Four out of seven!

......

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's forbidden body to be tempered to the level of seventy percent and eighty, and then it stopped, and this degree of refining was very close to eighty percent of the forbidden body!

I don't know how long it took for Ye Tian's realm to finally stabilize.

At this moment, he was already a true Dao Ancestor!
